do: Talk to Lilly Roth → take Fallen from Grace
Exit to The Twilight Strand
steps.tip: Part 2 begins. Same map as Act 1 but level 45+ — don't autopilot.

do: Clear ALL the undead on the beach — the tracker counts them down; Rhys of Abram is the big one
LOGOUT to town when the quest completes
steps.layout: The starting beach — linear, hug the shoreline.
steps.tip: Do NOT skip: 2 respec points AND it unlocks Lilly's full gem shop.

do: Turn in Fallen from Grace → Book of Regrets (Lilly Roth, 2 respec points)
Lilly now sells nearly every skill gem — buy your Act 6+ gem upgrades
Exit to The Coast
Tag the waypoint
IF you want Bestel's Epic: The Tidal Island has his Manuscript (rare belt/amulet on turn-in) — skip on a speed run
Talk to Ailith by the blocked passage (she grants the ability to burn the organic walls), then exit north-east to The Mud Flats
Kill The Dishonoured Queen → loot the Eye of Conquest
Socket the Eye at the sealed Karui totem door (old Fetid Pool spot) and enter The Karui Fortress
steps.layout: Karui camps sit on the old rhoa-nest arms — the Queen is among them.
steps.tip: Nessa's scene plays out here on its own — keep moving.

do: Enter the keep structure at the centre of the fortress and kill Tukohama — break his totems, stay off the burning ground
Exit the fortress to The Ridge
steps.tip: Turn-in is Tarkleigh (+1 passive) — save it for the town trip after Ryslatha. Sin introduces the Pantheon here; souls unlock on god kills automatically.

do: Tag the waypoint
Push through to The Lower Prison
steps.layout: Ledge-style canyon — follow it in one direction.

do: Tag the waypoint
DO the Trial of Ascendancy (spike traps) — first of three for Cruel Lab
Continue to Shavronne's Tower
Climb the five floors — ladder on floor 4 leads to the rooftop
Kill Shavronne the Returned — she swaps out with Reassembled Brutus mid-fight
Take the door that unlocks behind the arena and drop out to Prisoner's Gate
steps.tip: Lightning res for Shavronne, keep moving for Brutus' slams.

do: Tag the waypoint
Kill Abberath on the road — stay off the burning hoofprints
Follow the road out to The Western Forest
steps.tip: Nessa appears by the waterfall — the scene triggers on its own.

do: Follow the road, tag the waypoint
Exit to The Riverways
steps.layout: Same road as Act 2 — the barricade and Alira's camp are landmarks, not detours.

do: Tag the waypoint on the road
Take the side exit to The Wetlands (no waypoint there) → find The Spawning Ground inside → clear the pit; Ryslatha waits at the top on your way back out — kill her
LOGOUT to town
steps.layout: Wetlands branches off the river; the Southern Forest exit is further along the road.
steps.tip: Ryslatha = +1 passive on turn-in plus a Pantheon soul. Worth it every time.

do: Turn in: The Father of War (+1 passive, Tarkleigh), The Puppet Mistress (+1 passive, Tarkleigh), The Cloven One (+1 passive, Bestel) — Essence of Umbra also completes at Tarkleigh
Waypoint → The Riverways, take the southern exit to The Southern Forest
Tag the waypoint
Find the entrance to The Cavern of Anger and go in
Grab The Black Flag (quest-marked)
Push through — the far exit leads to The Beacon
Tag the waypoint
Climb the lighthouse and throw The Black Flag into the flames to summon Weylam Roth's ship
Board the Black Crest at the dock → sail to The Brine King's Reef
steps.tip: IF you spot the crafting bench here: it unlocks the +life bench craft — grab it.

do: Kill Tsoagoth, The Brine King — dodge the geysers and wave slams, clear the drowned adds between phases
Talk to Weylam Roth and sail to Act 7
steps.tip: His kill unlocks Soul of the Brine King — equip it (Pantheon) to stop stun-chains. Target: level 48–50 leaving Act 6.
